decisions.rationale: Observation refers to the M15 local/limited service on the First/Second Avenue corridor in Manhattan, discussed at the September 2009 CAC meeting. The base_record_id route_m15-local-limited is the correct canonical record for this variant, with aliases that include route_m15-cac-meeting-2009 and source 2009_09_23_brt_1st2nd_cac2. No other distinct registry record is a closer match, and the base record already fully represents this observation.

Observation refers to the Bx12 Select Bus Service in the Bronx, discussed at the September 2009 CAC meeting as a reference example SBS route. The base_record_id route_bx12-plus is the correct canonical record for Bx12 SBS, with aliases that include route_bx12-sbs-cac-meeting-2009 and source 2009_09_23_brt_1st2nd_cac2. No other distinct registry record is a closer match; the base record fully represents this observation.
